request.description: Creates a new activity. Requires admin authentication.
Retrieves all non-deleted activities. Requires user authentication.
Retrieves a specific activity by ID. Requires user authentication.
Updates an existing activity. Requires admin authentication.
Soft deletes an activity. Requires admin authentication.
Example: Create swimming activity
Example: Create yoga activity
Example: Create weight training activity
Calculates overall progress for a challenge based on all activity requirements and user's daily logs after joining
Calculates progress for a specific activity requirement in a challenge
Admin creates an activity requirement for a challenge (template)
Get all activity requirements for a challenge
Admin updates a challenge activity requirement. Cannot change relations or type.
Admin deletes an activity requirement from a challenge
User records their daily activity. Auto-calculates calories burned and updates daily log.
Example: Record activity using hours instead of reps (e.g., running, cycling)
Get all activity records for a specific daily log
Update user's activity record. Recalculates calories burned.
Delete user's activity record. Updates daily log calories.
Example: 200 push-ups challenge requirement
Example: Run 10km in 1 hour challenge
Example: Morning workout with 30 push-ups
Example: Evening 5km run in 30 minutes
Get specific activity record by ID. User can only access their own daily log records.

request.description: Create a new challenge (Admin only). Supports optional image upload and activity record assignment.
Get all active challenges (excluding soft-deleted). Includes activity records relation.
Get detailed information about a specific challenge including its activity records.
Update an existing challenge (Admin only). Supports partial updates and optional image replacement.
Soft delete a challenge (Admin only). Sets deleted_at timestamp but preserves data.
Mark a challenge as finished for the current user
Get all finished challenges for the current user
Assign a medal to a challenge (Admin only)
Get all challenge-medal assignments
Get a specific challenge-medal assignment by ID
Update a challenge-medal assignment (Admin only)
Delete a challenge-medal assignment (Admin only)
Usually created automatically via WebSocket join-video-call event
Join video call room and create call record
